name: Safe Ride Transportation
districts_or_customers: Forsyth County NC individuals; Medicaid/NEMT brokers; not a school district contractor based on public materials
recent_news: Active small NEMT operator in Winston-Salem/Lexington/Forsyth NC area; markets ~10 years of service (founded ~2008). No M&A or school-bus award news identified.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus / yellow-bus operator. Pure NEMT / wheelchair van micro-operator (3 employees, ~$200K revenue). Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Buckeye Transport Svc
districts_or_customers: Akron/Summit County OH Medicaid riders; NPI-registered NEMT van provider. No school district contracts identified.
recent_news: Ohio-incorporated micro NEMT van operator (NPI #1003125931, taxonomy 343900000X). Website (buckeyetransport.com) is a parked/for-sale domain, suggesting limited or dormant web presence. A separate, unrelated 'Buckeye Logistics & Transit' on Brittain Rd does school transport — different entity.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. Registered as NEMT van under Medicaid taxonomy; sub-$500K revenue, 1-4 staff, dead website. Not a viable Summit tuck-in target.

name: Best Way Non Emergency Med
districts_or_customers: Macomb County MI Medicaid/insurance riders; listed on Uber Health NEMT directory for Eastpointe. No school district contracts.
recent_news: Listed as a small NEMT provider in Eastpointe MI. Affiliated website Celerityservices.com is a parked/for-sale GoDaddy domain — suggests limited operational web presence. No M&A or growth news.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. Pure NEMT micro-business (3 employees, ~$182K revenue) with a dead corporate website. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in.

name: Liaise Transportation LLC
districts_or_customers: Moore County NC area Medicaid / private medical riders. NPI-registered NEMT van provider (NPI 1376200220). No school district contracts identified.
recent_news: NC-registered LLC providing non-emergency medical transport in Aberdeen/Pinehurst area. No M&A, growth, or school-contract news identified.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. NEMT/stretcher micro-business. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in (no yellow-bus fleet, no district contracts).

name: Ohio Valley Cab & Delivery Svc
districts_or_customers: Southeastern Ohio (Washington County) and parts of West Virginia; listed on Buckeye Hills regional aging provider directory. No school district contracts identified.
recent_news: Continues to operate 24/7 cab/NEMT/delivery service in Marietta OH. Local rural CABL public transit service launched separately by city — unrelated. No M&A activity.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator. Taxi + NEMT + delivery micro-business serving rural SE Ohio. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in.
